How It Works

Your Project Journey

From idea to launch in 5 simple steps

1

Consultation

Day 1

  • Free 30-min discovery call
  • Requirement gathering
  • Solution recommendation
  • Custom proposal & quotation
2

Planning

Day 2-3

  • Design mockups
  • Project roadmap
  • Contract & NDA signing
  • Project kickoff
3

Development

Day 4-12

  • Active development phase
  • Regular progress updates
  • Feedback iterations
  • Quality testing
4

Delivery

Day 13-15

  • Final deployment
  • Training & documentation
  • Handover session
  • Launch support
5

Support

Ongoing

  • Free maintenance period
  • 24/7 helpline access
  • Updates & improvements
  • Performance monitoring

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before getting started

Typically 7-15 days for standard websites. E-commerce and complex applications may take 3-6 weeks. We provide exact timelines after requirement analysis.

Yes! All projects include free support (3-12 months depending on package). We also offer paid maintenance plans for ongoing updates.

Absolutely! We offer redesign, optimization, AI integration, and feature additions for existing websites.

AI automation uses intelligent systems to handle repetitive tasks like email responses, data entry, scheduling, etc. It saves 20+ hours weekly and reduces errors to near zero.

Yes, you get complete ownership of all source code and design files upon final payment.

Bank Transfer, UPI, Credit/Debit Cards, PayPal. We work on a flexible payment model.

Yes, we sign NDAs before any project discussion to protect your confidential information.

Yes! We provide complete training sessions for using and managing your website/system.

We offer unlimited revisions within project scope until you're completely satisfied. Your happiness is our priority.
